superseded_outputs.reason: vol-target exposure recomputation failed to reproduce official current-cost events
reported OLS residuals after subtracting intercept; corrected audit uses strategy_return - beta * benchmark_return

block_dependence_audit.result: all five candidates passed leave-one-year and top-three-month concentration checks

strict_block_gate_sensitivity.strict_gate_result: 0 of 5 candidates passed deliberately strict concentration/leave-one-year gates; safer_defensive_zz500 was corrected to use overlay_return
strict_block_gate_sensitivity.interpretation: use as ranking and fragility evidence, not as a hard shortlist rejection

round356_358_audit.decision: keep four simulation lanes and one de-emphasized ultra-defensive reference
round356_358_audit.main_risk: all retained lanes are related variants of the same low-turnover repair family, not independent alpha factors

simulation_shortlist_replay.bug_fixed: safer_defensive_zz500 event source now uses overlay_return instead of pre-regime period_return

round360_362_audit.decision: config-to-event replay is now mandatory before simulation handoff
round360_362_audit.remaining_gap: retained lanes still need a raw-data-to-event generation entrypoint

round363_365_audit.decision: event-schema replay is mandatory; ADX public-indicator filter remains a defensive research lead only
round363_365_audit.reason: ADX improved defensive drawdown in some views but did not beat the primary defensive shortlist on OOS return/overlap.

round366_368_audit.decision: do not add mainboard pre-rank replacement to simulation shortlist
round366_368_audit.reason: mainboard pre-rank replacement raises entry tradability and return but keeps drawdown above the tolerated risk band after vol-target wrapping
round366_368_audit.process_upgrade: run shortlist exposure audit and pre-rank replacement checks before treating untradeable cash exposure as wasted alpha

round370_372_audit.decision: keep mainboard_prerank_vt6_zz500_half as a research lead only; do not add it to the simulation shortlist
round370_372_audit.reason: the lead is squeezed between existing primary_high_return and primary_defensive_zz500; it adds complexity without a clear shortlist win

round373_375_audit.decision: raw-data-to-event generation is not yet simulation-ready; event-calendar parity gate is mandatory before replacing official event sources
round373_375_audit.next_required_fix: diagnose and reproduce the official event-calendar aggregation rule before raw-generated event streams can be used for simulation handoff

round376_377_generation_handoff_policy.decision: keep simulation candidates on frozen replay-validated event sources; block raw-generated replacement event files until calendar parity passes
round376_377_generation_handoff_policy.process_upgrade: simulation shortlist config validation now requires raw_generation_policy and rejects candidates using blocked generated event sources

round376_378_audit.decision: continue simulation handoff with frozen replay-validated event sources; move raw generation parity to a separate blocked engineering track; resume independent factor-family mining

round379_public_defensive_oos_split.decision: do not add a public defensive filter to the simulation shortlist; keep ADX and KAMA filters as drawdown-prioritized research leads
round379_public_defensive_oos_split.process_upgrade: added reusable shortlist OOS split audit for frozen event-return sources

round379_381_audit.decision: public defensive filters remain research-only; forecast/express selected-trade filters rejected; Dragon-Tiger hot attention promoted to research quickcheck
round379_381_audit.next_direction: continue Dragon-Tiger event-risk filter, but require official event-calendar reconstruction before shortlist consideration

round380_forecast_express_selected_trade.decision: reject simple recent forecast/express selected-trade cash filters
round380_forecast_express_selected_trade.reason: negative forecast/express flags have positive full-cycle entry-cash contribution inside the primary selected basket

round381_dragon_tiger_selected_trade_eve.decision: promote dragon_hot_chase_20d and dragon_net_buy_20d to research quickcheck

round382_dragon_tiger_cash_filter_quickc.decision: keep cash_dragon_hot_chase_20d as a research lead only; block simulation consideration until official calendar reconstruction passes

round383_dragon_tiger_official_template_.decision: promote cash_dragon_hot_chase_20d from research lead to package-level comparison

round384_dragon_tiger_vt6_zz500_projecti.decision: add primary_high_return_dragon_hot_chase as a simulation observation lane
round384_dragon_tiger_vt6_zz500_projecti.incremental_edge_assessment: useful but small; consistent across full-sample, OOS, block, and beta checks

round382_384_audit.decision: Dragon-Tiger hot-chase is a usable event-risk overlay observation, not a new standalone alpha family
round382_384_audit.process_upgrade: event-risk filters must use official-template projection or calendar parity before shortlist consideration
round382_384_audit.next_direction: rotate to other factor families after recording this overlay

round385_price_volume_entry_filter_proje.decision: do not add a public price-volume entry filter to the simulation shortlist
round385_price_volume_entry_filter_proje.process_upgrade: added reusable selected-trade price-volume entry filter projection; public technical bad-state filters must be tested as selected-entry contribution effects before shortlist use

round386_market_temperature_overlay.decision: do not add a market-temperature overlay to the simulation shortlist
round386_market_temperature_overlay.reason: market-temperature scaling reduces drawdown but gives up return; existing dragon_hot_100 remains better for the return objective

round387_self_risk_overlay_on_dragon_hot.decision: add primary_high_return_dragon_hot_chase_self_risk_roll21 as a simulation risk-budget observation lane
round387_self_risk_overlay_on_dragon_hot.interpretation: not a new stock-selection alpha; useful risk-budget overlay because full-sample improves but OOS return remains below dragon_hot_100 baseline

round385_387_audit.decision: reject price-volume and market-temperature additions; promote self-risk roll21_sum_neg_half as a simulation risk-budget observation
round385_387_audit.process_upgrade: run self-risk overlay suite and event beta audit for every high-return event lane before simulation handoff
round385_387_audit.next_direction: continue event-timing filters, industry/style exposure constraints, ETF-aware risk-budget profiles, and capacity stress

round388_primary_self_risk_cost_stress.decision: supports roll21_sum_neg_half as a risk-budget observation, not a default replacement
round388_primary_self_risk_cost_stress.interpretation: self-risk improves full-sample risk-return at all cost levels and controls drawdown in OOS, but baseline retains higher mean OOS return

round389_trade_attribute_cash_filter.decision: do not add board, metadata, or northbound-eligibility selected-trade cash filters
round389_trade_attribute_cash_filter.process_upgrade: added generic selected-trade attribute cash-filter projection for board, industry, exchange, HS eligibility, and other frozen trade attributes

round390_trade_group_contribution_audit.decision: do not add hard industry, board, exchange, or HS bucket filters
round390_trade_group_contribution_audit.process_upgrade: added reusable selected-trade group contribution audit before industry/style/board rules are allowed into shortlist consideration

round388_390_audit.decision: keep self-risk as risk-budget observation; reject structural bucket filters; use industry metadata for concentration control, not hard alpha mining
round388_390_audit.next_direction: industry-aware exposure caps, public indicator families, corporate-event timing, and capacity stress

round391_public_adx_on_dragon_hot.decision: keep ADX as a defensive selected-entry research lead only
round391_public_adx_on_dragon_hot.blocker: public factor source missing share was above the configured gate

round392_adx_dragon_self_risk.decision: self-risk overlay is a more useful near-term improvement than expanding public indicator parameters

round393_public_factor_fullsource_adx_dr.decision: add primary_high_return_dragon_hot_chase_adx_fullsource_roll42 as a simulation observation lane, not a promotable factor
round393_public_factor_fullsource_adx_dr.remaining_blocker: ADX full-market source still has 34.04% missing share on the post-Dragon-Hot candidate universe

round391_393_audit.decision: do not continue broad public-indicator parameter expansion; keep ADX as a defensive observation and focus on point-in-time risk-budget packaging
round391_393_audit.next_direction: corporate-event timing, industry-aware risk budgets, capacity/cost stress, and ETF-aware simulation handoff profiles

round394_daily_basic_on_dragon_hot.decision: daily-basic filters do not improve high-return Dragon-Hot; PS is defensive only
round394_daily_basic_on_dragon_hot.remaining_blocker: PS projection unmatched absolute contribution 0.0120 exceeds the 0.005 official-template limit

round395_ps_dragon_self_risk.decision: add PS Dragon self-risk as ultra-defensive observation only, not as a promoted factor

round396_ps_on_dragon_threshold_sensitiv.decision: PS threshold curve is smooth risk-return trade-off; stop tuning until projection blocker is repaired

round394_396_audit.decision: PS-on-Dragon is useful only as low-drawdown risk-control evidence; add one observation lane and do not promote
round394_396_audit.next_direction: repair selected-entry projection calendar gate, then rotate to independent sources rather than more PS threshold tuning

round397_projection_unmatched_diagnostic.decision: improve selected-entry projection blocker diagnostics; keep PS-on-Dragon promotion blocked
round397_projection_unmatched_diagnostic.code_change: official-template projection now reports unmatched nonzero date count, zero date count, and unmatched absolute contribution by year

round398_qlib_alpha101_on_dragon_hot.decision: cash filtering failed because the selected quantiles were profitable; reinterpret qlib_alpha158_return_std_position_blend_20 as a high-return entry tilt
round398_qlib_alpha101_on_dragon_hot.method_upgrade: added reusable public-factor selected-entry tilt tooling for exposure multipliers instead of forcing every public factor into a cash-filter mold

round399_qlib_alpha101_tilt_audit.decision: add qlib top10 1.5x tilt as a high-return simulation observation, not as default
round399_qlib_alpha101_tilt_audit.caveat: return improves versus dragon_hot_100, but Sharpe/overlap and drawdown are weaker; keep as an aggressive observation lane

round397_399_audit.decision: public Alpha101/Qlib entry tilt produced the first new high-return observation after the PS defensive block
round397_399_audit.next_direction: combine high-return tilt with self-risk/ETF risk-budget variants, then rotate to independent event/accounting families if incremental overlap stays weak

round391_400_audit.decision: sync useful public-factor tooling and add qlib top10 tilt as an aggressive high-return simulation observation
round391_400_audit.process_upgrade: public rank-like factors must be tested as both cash filters and bounded exposure tilts before rejection
round391_400_audit.next_direction: test self-risk and ETF risk-budget wrappers on the Qlib tilt, then rotate family if risk-adjusted improvement remains weak

round401_qlib_alpha101_tilt_self_risk.decision: self-risk materially improves Qlib tilt; advance stable candidates to OOS/block/beta audit

round402_qlib_alpha101_tilt_self_risk_au.decision: add qlib top10 tilt + roll21 negative-half as the preferred Qlib risk-budget observation
round402_qlib_alpha101_tilt_self_risk_au.rejected_full_sample_trap: qlib_top15_m150_self_roll21_sum_m2_cash has stronger full-sample metrics but only 76.7% OOS strict pass

round403_qlib_alpha101_tilt_zz500_sensit.decision: do not add separate 0.75 or 0.50 ZZ500 Qlib tilt lanes; self-risk is the better risk-budget path

round401_403_audit.decision: Qlib top10 tilt plus self-risk is now the best new Qlib branch observation; stop expanding Qlib parameters
round401_403_audit.next_direction: rotate to independent accounting/event/source families unless simulation needs another Qlib comparison

round404_public_factor_source_memory_rep.decision: fixed public-factor source materialization to target selected trade pairs before cross-family concat

round405_public_factor_dragon_hot_projec.decision: advance Alpha101 open-close/vwap/intraday cash filters and tilts to vt6/ZZ500 audit; keep sparse Supertrend/Smart-money/OBV diagnostics blocked

round406_public_alpha101_dragon_hot_audi.decision: add aggressive Alpha101 open-close bottom10 tilt and balanced Alpha101 open-close top10 cash filter as simulation observations

round404_406_audit.decision: public Alpha101 open-close filter/tilt produced two useful simulation observations after broader public-factor rotation
round404_406_audit.next_direction: compare Alpha101 observations against Qlib self-risk and Dragon-Hot self-risk in the same simulation harness before more public Alpha101 expansion

round407_alpha101_dragon_hot_self_risk.decision: self-risk repaired the aggressive Alpha101 tilt drawdown; advance m2_cash and neg_half variants to OOS audit

round408_alpha101_self_risk_audit.decision: prefer alpha_tilt_open_neghalf; reject m2_cash as an OOS trap despite stronger full-sample metrics
round408_alpha101_self_risk_audit.rejected_full_sample_trap: alpha_tilt_open_m2cash has 7.65% full-sample annualized return but only 76.7% strict OOS pass

round409_alpha101_vs_qlib_marginal_audit.decision: add alpha_tilt_open_neghalf as a stronger replacement/variant observation, not an independent factor family

round407_409_audit.decision: Alpha101 open-close tilt plus roll21 neg-half self-risk is now the strongest Alpha101/Qlib-style risk-budget observation but is highly correlated with Qlib
round407_409_audit.next_direction: Round410 ten-round package and GitHub sync, then rotate away from Alpha101/Qlib expansion unless simulation comparison specifically requires it

round401_410_audit.decision: public Alpha101/Qlib Dragon-Hot risk-budget work produced stronger simulation observations and memory-safe public-factor tooling
round401_410_audit.process_upgrade: target selected trade pairs before cross-family public-factor concat; reject full-sample self-risk traps when OOS strict pass drops
round401_410_audit.next_direction: same-harness simulation comparison or rotation to genuinely independent event/accounting sources

round411_simulation_shortlist_ranking.decision: rank current simulation shortlist under a -30% user drawdown limit and mark near-duplicate return streams
round411_simulation_shortlist_ranking.initial_replay_blocker: self-risk overlay outputs preserved return metrics but dropped event schema columns

round412_self_risk_schema_repair.decision: preserve event schema through self-risk overlays and recompute final_exposure as source_final_exposure times self_risk_exposure
round412_self_risk_schema_repair.process_upgrade: self-risk overlay outputs are now structurally usable for simulation replay

round413_unique_candidate_blend_search.decision: do not add a blended candidate because 100% top Alpha101 open-close self-risk remains best

round411_413_audit.decision: simulation-readiness tooling improved; top Alpha101 self-risk remains the best single candidate and blends do not improve it
round411_413_audit.next_direction: rotate away from correlated Alpha101/Qlib/Dragon-Hot variants toward independent PIT sources or direct paper-simulation harness

round414_independent_source_triage.decision: do not open a new independent-source mining grid before simulation preparation because reviewed families are coverage-blocked, hibernated, or not reusable without expensive recomputation
round414_independent_source_triage.next_direction: prepare current best CN stock candidate for simulated paper stage while keeping live boundaries closed

round415_signal_reconstruction_audit.decision: do not hand the current top candidate directly to paper simulation; event-return evidence is exactly reproducible but exit-timed controls must be rebuilt at entry decision time
round415_signal_reconstruction_audit.next_direction: Round416 entry-timed exposure reconstruction and full-sample/OOS gate rerun before simulated paper handoff

round416_entry_timed_overlay_audit.decision: add paper_ready_dragon_hot_alpha101_openclose_entry_timed_vt6_self_roll21 as the entry-timed paper-simulation-safe version of the Round407 research observation
round416_entry_timed_overlay_audit.next_direction: compare entry-timed candidate against simpler shortlist lanes in the paper simulation adapter and continue factor mining with entry-timed causality as a hard gate

round414_416_three_round_audit.decision: pivot from more correlated mining to paper-readiness repair; Round407 remains a research observation and Round416 is the entry-timed handoff candidate
round414_416_three_round_audit.paper_simulation_gate: candidate controls must be computable before entry decision time

round417_simulation_shortlist_with_entry.decision: use the entry-timed candidate for paper-simulation preparation; keep the higher-return exit-timed stream as a research benchmark only

round418_entry_timed_public_factor_grid.decision: do not add vwap or intraday as independent factors because top Alpha101 variants have pairwise event-return correlations above 0.9997

round419_entry_timed_risk_budget_sensiti.decision: add aggressive entry-timed paper-ready candidate for simulation comparison under the user's -30% drawdown tolerance

round420_simulation_shortlist_with_aggre.decision: superseded by Round421 cohort-level reconstruction; the aggregate aggressive candidate is no longer considered a true paper-simulation handoff

round411_420_ten_round_audit.decision: one stronger aggressive paper-ready candidate found; entry-timed causality is now a mandatory promotion gate
round411_420_ten_round_audit.next_direction: superseded by Round421 cohort-level reconstruction before paper-simulation adapter comparison

round421_cohort_entry_timed_repair.decision: true paper-simulation handoff must preserve entry/exit cohort timing; use the cohort-level candidate instead of aggregate exit-date event streams

round422_simulation_shortlist_with_cohor.decision: formal ranking now blocks explicit not-paper-ready aggregate streams and keeps the cohort-level candidate eligible

round423_cohort_entry_timed_cost_stress.decision: 5 and 10 bps stay within the user's drawdown tolerance; 20 and 30 bps remain profitable but breach -30% max drawdown

round421_423_three_round_audit.decision: cohort-level signal reconstruction is now mandatory before paper-simulation handoff
round421_423_three_round_audit.next_direction: run heavier-cost cohort risk-budget grid or start paper-simulation adapter around the 10 bps cohort candidate

round424_cohort_heavy_cost_risk_budget_g.decision: keep the 10 bps cohort candidate as default; use cost20 variant for heavier-cost simulation and cost30 variant only as defensive stress fallback

paper_simulation_handoff_candidates.formula: trade-level cohort source grouped by entry_date + delayed_exit_date; cash_dragon_hot_chase_20d + 1.50x bottom 10% alpha101_open_close_pressure_fade_10 tilt + delayed-exit return repair + entry-timed vol_target_8_lb84 max_exposure_1.00 + entry-timed self-risk roll21_sum_neg_0.80x

self_risk_overlay.decision_timing: entry_date; uses only cohort returns closed before each entry decision
